name: @gharikishore/backlog-kit
description: Drop-in admin + bug-capture + triage system for any Next.js + Postgres app. Floating Bug · Feedback widget · magic-link sign-in · admin chrome (AdminHeader/AdminLayout) · Fiori-style launchpad tile menu · full backlog dashboard with state machine + ship-gate + audit log · bundled schema + migrations.
author: Hari Gunupudi <harigunupudi@gmail.com>
